productDisplayName: Nike Fragrances Women Magic Passion Perfume 150 ml
description: A part of the nike fragrances 150 Beyond Elements line, the nike fragrances Magic Passion for women comes in a colour happy flask, styled to look like a sipper, so delectable that your olfactory senses will never get enough of this. Wear this with semi-formal ensembles.Caution: Flammable, Keep away from sources of ignition, Keep away from children. Do not use near fire, flame or heat, Avoid spraying near the eyes
